factionAbilities.name: QUANTUM ENTANGLEMENT
factionAbilities.effect: You treat all systems that contain either an alpha or beta wormhole as adjacent to each other. Game effects cannot prevent you from using this ability.

factionAbilities.name: SLIPSTREAM
factionAbilities.effect: During your tactical actions, apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships that starts its movement in your home system or in a system that contains either an alpha or beta wormhole.

factionAbilities.name: CREUSS GATE
factionAbilities.effect: When you create the game board, place the Creuss Gate (tile 17) where your home system would normally be placed. The Creuss Gate system is not a home system. Then, place your home system (tile 51) in your play area.

versions.timing: At the start of your turn during the action phase:
versions.effect: Place or move a Creuss wormhole token into either a system that contains a planet you control or a non-home system that does not contain another player's ships. Then, return this card to the Creuss player.
At the start of the status phase, place or move a Creuss wormhole token into either a system that contains a planet you control or a non-home system that does not contain another player's ships.
ACTION: Exhaust this card to place or move a Creuss wormhole token into either a system that contains a planet you control or a non-home system that does not contain another player's ships.

factionTechnologies.name: Dimensional Splicer
factionTechnologies.effect: At the start of space combat in a system that contains a wormhole and 1 or more of your ships, you may produce 1 hit and assign it to 1 of your opponent's ships.

factionSpecificComponents.name: Creuss Gate (tile 17)
factionSpecificComponents.description: A tile placed in the hex where the Creuss home system would be. It contains a delta wormhole.

factionSpecificComponents.name: Alpha Wormhole Token
factionSpecificComponents.description: Placed or moved by Creuss faction technology and promissory note. Causes an alpha wormhole to appear in whatever system it is placed in.

factionSpecificComponents.name: Beta Wormhole Token
factionSpecificComponents.description: Placed or moved by Creuss faction technology and promissory note. Causes a beta wormhole to appear in whatever system it is placed in.

factionSpecificComponents.name: Gamma Wormhole Token
factionSpecificComponents.description: Placed or moved by Creuss faction technology and promissory note. Causes a gamma wormhole to appear in whatever system it is placed in.

abilities.name: Delta Wormhole
abilities.effect: This ship's system contains a delta wormhole. During movement, this ship may move before or after your other ships.

abilities.name: Wormhole Placement
abilities.effect: After any player activates a system, you may remove this unit from the game board to place or move a Creuss wormhole token into this system.
abilities.notes: 'This system' refers to the system that contains the mech, NOT the system that was activated.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías azules pueden usarse como amarillas para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Particle Synthesis
ability.effect: Each wormhole in a system that contains your ships gains PRODUCTION 1 as if it were a unit you control. Reduce the combined cost of units you produce in systems that contain wormholes by 1 for each wormhole in that system.

agent.name: Emissary Taivra
agent.ability: After a player activates a system that contains a non-delta wormhole: You may exhaust this card; if you do, that system is adjacent to all other systems that contain a wormhole during this tactical action.

commander.name: Sai Seravus
commander.unlock: Have units in 3 systems that contain alpha or beta wormholes.
commander.ability: After your ships move: For each ship that has a capacity value and moved through 1 or more wormholes, you may place 1 fighter from your reinforcements with that ship if you have unused capacity in the active system.

hero.name: Riftwalker Meian
hero.ability: SINGULARITY REACTOR — ACTION: Swap the positions of any 2 systems that contain wormholes or your units, other than the Creuss system and the Wormhole Nexus. Then, purge this card.
